testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Cart Page Shows Inline Accept.js Form and allowCartPayment Cross-Layer Check
testCases.notes: AN form rendered inline on /cart as native HTML inputs (not cross-origin iframe). All 7 assertions passed. No redirect to /checkout/payment. Place order button disabled with empty fields.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Method Switch Guard: AN → Manual → Place Order Does Not Charge Card
testCases.notes: AN form filled (4007000000027, 12/29, CVV 900), then switched to Manual — AN form unmounted, Manual UI rendered. Place order created CO260605-00027 via Manual method (PaymentIn status New, no AN network call). Order cancelled in admin.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Invalid Card Number Rejected by Accept.js Client-Side Validation
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Inline error message on card number field for Luhn-invalid input
testCases.notes: Known bug — documented in reports/bugs/BUG-AN-cart-no-client-card-validation.md. No client-side Luhn/expiry validation in the inline AN Accept.js form on /cart. Place order button enables with invalid card number.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Empty Required Fields Block Submission
testCases.notes: Place order button disabled with all fields empty. Button remains disabled with partial fill (card only). Button enables only after all required fields filled (card, expiry, CVV).

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Successful Cart-Embedded Payment Reaches Order Confirmation
testCases.failedAssertion: [NAV] From /cart with inline AN form → order confirmation reached without /checkout/payment redirect
testCases.notes: SUPERSEDED: artifact of the 12/2029-in-MM/YY-mask expiry trap (entered expired 12/20 → known no-validation bug → fallback redirect) and/or detached dataLayer proxy. PAYAN edge re-run + 040-dt: no detour, beacon fired. See regression report. Order CO260605-00025 created and reached /checkout/completed, but flow transited through /checkout/payment before confirmation (redirect to /checkout/payment observed). CSV asserts 'not redirected to /checkout/payment'. The payment did succeed end-to-end (order confirmed, cart cleared), but the AllowCartPayment flow redirects to /checkout/payment step en route. Order cancelled in admin.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Accept.js Script Load Failure Does Not Strand User on /cart
testCases.notes: tooling — test requires blocking js.authorize.net via browser DevTools Network request blocking; Playwright MCP does not expose this capability. Cannot use browser_evaluate/run_code_unsafe per enforcement rules.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - GA4 Purchase Event Fires Exactly Once for Cart-Embedded Payment
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] Exactly 1 purchase event in GA4 dataLayer (window._ga4_purchases.length === 1)
testCases.notes: SUPERSEDED: artifact of the 12/2029-in-MM/YY-mask expiry trap (entered expired 12/20 → known no-validation bug → fallback redirect) and/or detached dataLayer proxy. PAYAN edge re-run + 040-dt: no detour, beacon fired. See regression report. dataLayer intercept proxy installed via allowed GA4 path. Order CO260605-00025 confirmed on /checkout/completed. window._ga4_purchases.length returned 0 — no purchase event captured. The useCheckout.ts purchase event did not fire for the AN cart-embedded flow, or fired before the intercept proxy was installed. Order cancelled in admin.

testCases.title: Authorize.Net - Multistep Checkout: Card Form on Billing Step Survives Unmount and Charges at Place Order
testCases.notes: checkout_multistep_enabled config flag is OFF on vcst-qa. Pre-check: /checkout/review redirects back to /cart confirming flag is OFF. BLOCKED per suite instruction.

testCases.title: Skyflow - Per-Brand CVV Length Validation (Amex 4-Digit vs MC 3-Digit)
testCases.notes: Skyflow uses cross-origin iframes (js.skyflow.com) — Playwright cannot interact with cross-origin iframe.

bugs.title: Authorize.Net AllowCartPayment flow redirects through /checkout/payment before reaching order confirmation
bugs.failedAssertion: User navigates to order confirmation page without redirect to /checkout/payment
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Log in as personal user. 2. Add item to cart, navigate to /cart. 3. Select Authorize.Net payment method — inline form renders. 4. Fill card 4007000000027, expiry 12/29, CVV 900, cardholder name. 5. Click Place order. 6. Observe navigation path.
bugs.expected: Direct navigation from /cart to /checkout/completed without transiting /checkout/payment (AllowCartPayment=true design intent: skip the /checkout/payment redirect step).
bugs.actual: Navigation goes /cart → /checkout/payment → /checkout/payment/success → /checkout/completed. The order is successfully created and payment authorized, but the flow transits through /checkout/payment contrary to the AllowCartPayment=true design intent documented in VCST-5162.
bugs.dismissReason: Artifact of expiry MM/YY truncation test-data trap (BUG_040_001) / proxy detachment (BUG_040_002); refuted by PAYAN edge re-run with corrected expiry.

bugs.title: Authorize.Net cart-embedded payment: GA4 purchase event not firing on /checkout/completed
bugs.failedAssertion: window._ga4_purchases.length === 1 after AN cart-embedded order confirmation
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Log in as personal user. 2. Add item to cart, navigate to /cart. 3. Install dataLayer purchase interceptor via console (dataLayer.push proxy). 4. Select Authorize.Net, fill valid card (4007000000027 / 12/29 / 900). 5. Click Place order. 6. Wait for /checkout/completed. 7. Check window._ga4_purchases.length.
bugs.expected: Exactly 1 GA4 purchase event fired by useCheckout.ts on order confirmation, with transaction_id matching the order number.
bugs.actual: window._ga4_purchases.length === 0. No purchase event captured in the dataLayer intercept. Either the useCheckout.ts purchase event is not firing for the AN cart-embedded flow, or it fires at a different lifecycle point that pre-dates the interceptor installation. Note: the flow also transits through /checkout/payment (BUG_040_001), which may affect when/whether the GA4 event fires.
bugs.dismissReason: Artifact of expiry MM/YY truncation test-data trap (BUG_040_001) / proxy detachment (BUG_040_002); refuted by PAYAN edge re-run with corrected expiry.
